title: Smoky Hash Brown Cakes
description: A twist on traditional hash browns, these smoky cakes are perfect for a quick breakfast or brunch.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the hash browns, grated celeriac, smoky paprika, salt, and black pepper. Mix well to combine.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into 6-8 patties.
Place the patties on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with a little bit of oil and sprinkle with zesty Italian seasoning.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, flipping halfway through.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings, such as sour cream, chives, or bacon bits.
